commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves `sourceUrl`, `artifact`, and `skillFile` from ClawHub skill `.clawhub/origin.json` readback and exposes them as optional linked status fields.

PR surface: Source +48, Tests +119. Total +167 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main writes provenance into origin metadata but the shared normalizer drops it before status-link readback; I did not run tests because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
